family_rationale: This is the next unprocessed non-sims refined-fuel source in folder order after the geometry batch.
The document is a structured overlay-governance surface rather than a kernel math contract, so it fits a bounded single-doc overlay extract.

Its dominant value is the fail-closed boundary that permits strategic and payoff analogies only as explicit non-binding overlays while blocking agency, utility, equilibrium, rationality, prediction, and validation drift.
No active A2 surfaces were mutated.
possible_downstream_consequence_policy: possible downstream consequence only; preserve this as the game-overlay governance fence in which player/strategy/payoff/equilibrium analogies stay explicit, removable, versioned, and non-authoritative for kernel meaning or admission
